title: Elleanthus columnaris
taxonomy: Elleanthus columnaris is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It belongs to the genus Elleanthus, which consists of several species of epiphytic plants. Elleanthus columnaris is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is characterized by its showy white flowers and is often found growing on trees in its natural habitat. Within the family Melastomataceae, Elleanthus columnaris is closely related to other species such as Miconia and Tetrameris.
